title: deck
description: The authored (or refined) slidey deck source.

spec_path.description: Path to the deck JSON spec — the render entrypoint.

summary.description: One-line human summary of what was authored/edited.

edited.description: Refine pass only: the opaque semantic-element refs (slidey '<scene>/<el>' form, e.g. '1/card_0') edited this pass.
